title: NoteLock
description: This mod lets you lock a Note Block's note, so that no one can detune your Note Block instruments.
body:
# NoteLock

Are you tired of random people on your server right-clicking on your wonderful Note Block creations, messing the correct notes up ?

This mod ends your suffering by letting you **lock** those **Note Blocks**, so that **right-clicks don't modify the note** of a Note Block, but **play the note** instead. This is also useful for playing Note Blocks in **Creative Mode**!

## Commands

#### Locking a Note Block:
`/notelock lock <x> <y> <z>`

#### Unlocking a Note Block:
`/notelock unlock <x> <y> <z>`

---

![3 Note Blocks placed next to each other from the point of view of a Minecraft player in Creative Mode, writing in the chat the command "/notelock lock"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JSWk9a4s/images/a689daf9902be79baee65376e8052b15383a6023.png)
